name: higher-order
description: Higher-order reasoning, planning, design, and writing skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Reasoning guardrails for stronger agent work.
interface.longDescription: Higher Order packages reusable Codex skills for scoping work, defining success, writing deterministic implementation guidance, structuring projects, and reviewing UI design without adding runtime command enforcement.
defaultPrompt: Define success before implementing this change.
Review this UI spec against product constraints.
